Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface ILabelSymbolTable

All Superinterfaces:
ISCState, IState, ISymbolTable<ILabeledElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ILabeledElement>,ILabelSymbolInfo>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IContextLabelSymbolTable, IEventLabelSymbolTable, IMachineLabelSymbolTable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextLabelSymbolTable, EventLabelSymbolTable, MachineLabelSymbolTable
public interface ILabelSymbolTable extends ISymbolTable<ILabeledElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ILabeledElement>,ILabelSymbolInfo>, ISCState
Common protocol for symbol tables of labeled elements.
Since:
1.0
